title: Minecraft, but better...
description: A small modpack that adds cool vanilla like features to your world.
body:
**This is a small modpack that adds cool vanilla like features to your world!
**
In this modpack, there are a bunch of new blocks, items, biomes, mechanics and much more to discover! All the new things are vanilla like, that means that they fit well into Minecraft.

You can play with friends if you want because the modpack is perfect for a modded smp.

**This modpack have :**
- A revamped end dimension
- A new nether biome
- New mechanics about ores, polished gems and grindstone.
- New armor set, weapons ans tools
- New biomes in the overworld (also caves biomes)
- A bunch of new dangerous mobs to fight as well as new weapons type like a scythe 

The modpack has some optimisation mods but it is not perfect. You can also add the Essential mod if you want.
